response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse language proficiency (TypeScript, DLang, C++, etc.)
Proven experience in performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical educator with workshop leadership
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware design
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture analysis
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU optimization background
